flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Emory University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($55.5k → $64.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Emory University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($55.5k → $64.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Emory University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Emory University are 70% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($80.1k vs $47.1k).
